violations.description: FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls under and around in place equipment noted in need of cleaning.
EMPLOYEE PRACTICES (1 pts): A personal beverage cups were observed in an improper container (No Lids) in food prep areas.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Interior of prep coolers Ice machine exterior pop nozzel holder at server station in upstairs bar nand other equipment exteriors noted in need of cleaning.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): A hand drying device was noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in the bar. No towels present at the main bar or Lodge bar.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Microwave interiors not properly maintained.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Interior of prep coolers Ice machine exterior and other equipment exteriors noted in need of cleaning.
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Hood and filters above grill noted not clean.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors under and around in place equipment in the kitchen and all bar areas noted in need of cleaning.
